critic_notes: Section 3.2 (Lebenszyklus-Modell) has three focused questions. All quote fragments are verbatim substrings of the normalized source bullet list. Correct answers match the source enumeration exactly, including the two 'falls erforderlich' markers on Beschaffung and Aussonderung and the parenthetical inside the Betrieb bullet. Distractors (PDCA, two-phase split, Zertifizierung) are sensibly wrong. Topic methodik, basis difficulty, page 18 and schema null/null all fit.
